pages.title: Buckhead Atlanta News
pages.description: News from Buckhead Atlanta. Real estate, restaurants, retail, and community updates from Atlanta's uptown neighborhood.
pages.seoContent:
Buckhead is Atlanta's uptown commercial and residential district, home to Lenox Square, Phipps Plaza, and some of the city's most expensive real estate. The neighborhood has been at the center of ongoing debates about cityhood, public safety, and development.

Our daily coverage includes real estate developments, restaurant openings along Peachtree Road and in Buckhead Village, retail news from the malls, and community updates. Whether you're tracking the latest luxury condo project or a new dining spot, we pull from sources like Urbanize Atlanta, SaportaReport, and Atlanta Magazine to keep Buckhead residents informed.

pages.title: Decatur Georgia News
pages.description: Hyperlocal news from Decatur, Georgia. City government, restaurants, Decatur Square events, school news, and community updates.
pages.seoContent:
Decatur is an independent city within DeKalb County, known for its walkable downtown, excellent schools, and tight-knit community. From City Schools of Decatur updates to what's opening on the square, we cover it all.

Our coverage draws heavily from Decaturish, the go-to hyperlocal source for Decatur and DeKalb news, plus regional outlets like SaportaReport and Atlanta Magazine. Whether it's a new restaurant on Ponce, city commission decisions, or community events at Legacy Park, you'll find it here.

Looking for nearby coverage? Check out news from Kirkwood, East Atlanta Village, or Inman Park.
